name: sentinel-relay
description: Sentinel Relay: a Band-powered multi-agent cybersecurity incident workspace.

scripts.verify: bash scripts/dev/verify-web-baseline.sh && python scripts/dev/verify-streamlined-ui.py && python scripts/dev/verify-public-surface.py && python scripts/workflow/verify-mock-flow.py && python scripts/provider/verify-provider-layer.py && python scripts/report/verify-report-layer.py && python scripts/demo/verify-evidence-pack.py && python scripts/demo/verify-agent-run-api.py && python3 agents/mock/run_mock_flow.py && python3 agents/mock/verify_evidence_analysis.py && python3 agents/mock/verify_aimlapi_enrichment.py && python3 agents/mock/verify_agent_quality.py && python3 agents/mock/verify_fixture_generalization.py && python3 agents/mock/verify_turn_adapter.py && python3 agents/mock/verify_collaboration_api_worker.py
